markdown.title: Daily Paper Digest
markdown.text:
# Daily Paper Digest - March 25, 2026

Found *22* relevant papers in the last 24 hours

## Quantum Machine Learning & Architecture (6)
- [Q-AGNN: Quantum-Enhanced Attentive Graph Neural Network for Intrusion Detection (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22365) - Devashish Chaudhary, Sutharshan Rajasegarar, Shiva Raj Pokhrel (arXiv)
- [A PAC-Bayesian approach to generalization for quantum models (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22964) - Pablo Rodriguez-Grasa, Matthias C. Caro, Jens Eisert, Elies Gil-Fuster, Franz J. Schreiber, Carlos Bravo-Prieto (arXiv)
- [All you need is spin: SU(2) equivariant variational quantum circuits based on spin networks (v2)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.07250) - Richard D. P. East, Guillermo Alonso-Linaje, Chae-Yeun Park (arXiv)
- [Automating quantum feature map design via large language models (v2)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.07396) - Kenya Sakka, Kosuke Mitarai, Keisuke Fujii (arXiv)
- [Encoding Numerical Data for Generative Quantum Machine Learning (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23407) - Michael Krebsbach, Florentin Reiter, Thomas Wellens, Hagen-Henrik Kowalski, Ali Abedi (arXiv)
- [Information-Theoretic Scaling Laws of Neural Quantum States (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23468) - Yiming Lu, Sriram Bharadwaj, Dikshant Rathore, Di Luo (arXiv)

## Quantum Error Correction & Mitigation (6)
- [Physics-Inspired Extrapolation for efficient error mitigation and hardware certification (v3)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.07977) - Pablo D\'iez-Valle, Gaurav Saxena, Jack S. Baker, Jun-Ho Lee, Thi Ha Kyaw (arXiv)
- [STAR-Magic Mutation: Even More Efficient Analog Rotation Gates for Early Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computer (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22891) - Riki Toshio, Shota Kanasugi, Jun Fujisaki, Hirotaka Oshima, Shintaro Sato, Keisuke Fujii (arXiv)
- [Limitations of Noisy Quantum Devices in Computational and Entangling Power (v2)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.02836) - Yuxuan Yan, Zhenyu Du, Junjie Chen, Xiongfeng Ma (arXiv)
- [Enabling Chemically Accurate Quantum Phase Estimation in the Early Fault-Tolerant Regime (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22778) - Shota Kanasugi, Riki Toshio, Kazunori Maruyama, Hirotaka Oshima (arXiv)
- [High-yield integration design of fixed-frequency superconducting qubit systems using siZZle-CZ gates (v2)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21537) - Kazuhisa Ogawa, Yutaka Tabuchi, Makoto Negoro (arXiv)
- [Composable Verification in the Circuit-Model via Magic-Blindness (v2)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.07111) - Sami Abdul Sater, Harold Ollivier (arXiv)

## Quantum Generative Models (1)
- [Latent Style-based Quantum Wasserstein GAN for Drug Design (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22399) - Julien Baglio, Yacine Haddad, Richard Polifka (arXiv)

## PDE Solving & Deep Learning Theory (9)
- [Solving Nonlinear Partial Differential Equations via a Hybrid Newton Method Using Quantum Linear System Solver (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23258) - Maximilian Mandelt Buxad\'e, Stefan Langer, Philipp Bekemeyer (arXiv)
- [Coordinate Encoding on Linear Grids for Physics-Informed Neural Networks (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22700) - Tetsuro Tsuchino, Motoki Shiga (arXiv)
- [A Schr\"odinger Eigenfunction Method for Long-Horizon Stochastic Optimal Control (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23173) - Louis Claeys, Artur Goldman, Zebang Shen, Niao He (arXiv)
- [UniFluids: Unified Neural Operator Learning with Conditional Flow-matching (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22309) - Haosen Li, Qi Meng, Jiahao Li, Rui Zhang, Ruihua Song, Liang Ma, Zhi-Ming Ma (arXiv)
- [Symbolic Graph Networks for Robust PDE Discovery from Noisy Sparse Data (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22380) - Xingyu Chen, Junxiu An, Jun Guo, Yuqian Zhou (arXiv)
- [Weak-PDE-Net: Discovering Open-Form PDEs via Differentiable Symbolic Networks and Weak Formulation (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22951) - Xinxin Li, Xingyu Cui, Jin Qi, Juan Zhang, Da Li, Junping Yin (arXiv)
- [FEDONet : Fourier-Embedded DeepONet for Spectrally Accurate Operator Learning (v4)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.12344) - Arth Sojitra, Mrigank Dhingra, Omer San (arXiv)
- [Artificial intelligence for partial differential equations in computational mechanics: A review (v3)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.19843) - Yizheng Wang, Jinshuai Bai, Zhongya Lin, Qimin Wang, Cosmin Anitescu, Jia Sun, Mohammad Sadegh Eshaghi, Yuantong Gu, Xi-Qiao Feng, ..., Yinghua Liu (arXiv)
- [Sparsely-Supervised Data Assimilation via Physics-Informed Schr\"odinger Bridge (v1)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22319) - Dohyun Bu, Chanho Kim, Seokun Choi, Jong-Seok Lee (arXiv)
